title: GenerateExportsMap
description: Generates the Node.js package exports map for an npm package by reading per-directory package.json shims.

npmDir.description: Path to the assembled npm package directory (containing the root package.json and per-directory shims).

assetWildcards.description: Wildcard subpath patterns to add as pass-through asset exports (e.g. './dist/*'). Each pattern maps to itself.
